title: When was the Hubble Space Telescope launched?
goal: Find the launch date of the Hubble Space Telescope.
constraints: Source must be NASA.gov or Wikipedia
rubric: Reports the Hubble launch date (1990-04-24) with a source.
final_answer: The Hubble Space Telescope was launched on April 24, 1990 aboard Space Shuttle Discovery (STS-31) and deployed the following day.
